transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Tom Bradley. I'm calling because my thermostat keeps short cycling. Dispatcher: Hi Tom, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Trane, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 22 Oak Court. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out tomorrow between 8 and 10 AM. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Trane thermostat, an older one, 15 years
